title: Amazon to Invest an Additional $5 Billion in Anthropic
description: Amazon.com Inc. is investing an additional $5 billion in Anthropic PBC, and may inject $20 billion more over time, a deal that deepens the companies’ ties in an increasingly competitive artificial intelligence industry.

title: Google Bets on New Chips to Boost AI Results, Challenging Nvidia
description: In a matter of months, Google’s AI chips have become one of the hottest commodities in the tech sector. Leading artificial intelligence developers, including some of the firm’s biggest rivals, are stocking up on them. Now, the Alphabet Inc.-owned company aims to build on its momentum with the likely introduction of new chips dedicated to inference, or running AI models after they’ve been trained. With this push, Google is poised to further challenge market leader Nvidia Corp. in a fast-growing category for semiconductors that’s fueled by surging adoption of AI software. Bloomberg News AI Infrastructure Reporter Dina Bass joins Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss. She speaks with Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Names Ternus as Next CEO; Tim Cook to Become Chairman
description: Apple Inc. Chief Executive Officer Tim Cook will hand the reins to hardware boss John Ternus later this year, capping a 15-year tenure that turned the company into a $4 trillion business spanning watches, video streaming and financial services.
